docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DANIEL R. STERN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT DAKHEEL, FAHAD AL AN INDIVIDUAL
